summary: Closed, unmerged THP decoder cleanup/matching PR touching only THPDec.c and thp.h. It refined THP struct layouts, named a Huffman-table count field, passed THPFileInfo explicitly through the 512x448 iMCU row path, and restored more low-level THPInit behavior. decomp.dev reported a small net matched-code gain (+0.03%, +984 bytes) and one new match, but also one broken 100% match, so this should be treated as a useful evidence slice rather than a landed change.

key_files.role: Adjusted THP struct layouts and prototypes, including THPHuffmanTab, THPComponent, THPFileInfo, __THPDecompressiMCURow512x448, and THPInit.
Applied matching-oriented implementation changes in THP Huffman parsing, 512x448 MCU-row decompression, and THPInit.

what_changed: Changed THPHuffmanTab layout from u32 pad2[2] to u32 pad2 plus u16 num_Vij, and updated __THPReadHuffmanTableSpecification to assign info->huffmanTabs[tab_index].num_Vij instead of writing through pad2[1].
Added a leading unknown u8 field named _ to THPComponent.
Changed THPFileInfo pad2 from a u32 array sized by (0x83d - 0x756) / 4 to an exact byte array u8 pad2[0x83d - 0x756], preserving a byte-precise odd-sized gap.
Changed __THPDecompressiMCURow512x448 from taking no arguments to taking THPFileInfo*, updated the header prototype, and passed __THPInfo from __THPDecompressYUV.

Reworked __THPDecompressiMCURow512x448 internals to use the explicit info parameter for MCUsPerRow, Huffman decode calls, component access, quantTabs, RST handling, currMCU/nMCU/cnt updates, and predDC reset instead of repeatedly using global __THPInfo.
Changed THPInit prototype and implementation return type from BOOL to void, removed setting __THPInitFlag and returning TRUE, and ended with return.
Added low-level THPInit setup: PPCMfhid2 check, DCInvalidateRange on 0xE0000000 size 0x4000, LCEnable, and OSInitFastCast call.
Adjusted __THPLCWork672 buffer spacing in THPInit from +0x2A00/+0xA80 to +0x2800/+0xA00 before the third buffer.
Made minor formatting-only edits in THPVideoDecode and Huffman decode blocks, including brace placement and line wrapping.
smart_moves: Promoting pad2[1] to a named num_Vij field documents an inferred Huffman-table member and makes the access in __THPReadHuffmanTableSpecification clearer while improving that function's reported match from 99.01% to 99.91%.
Using byte-granular padding for THPFileInfo avoids losing layout precision around the 0x83d - 0x756 gap, which is especially important for SDK structs with non-word-aligned fields.

Passing THPFileInfo* into __THPDecompressiMCURow512x448 makes the 512x448 path consistent with other THP helpers that already take an info pointer and can influence register allocation/global-load patterns for matching.
Restoring hardware-facing initialization calls in THPInit, including LCEnable and OSInitFastCast, moves the decomp closer to SDK behavior rather than only stubbing success.
The PR kept the changes localized to one THP source file and one THP header, making the matching effects easy to inspect in the decomp.dev report.
decomp_lessons: When a padding slot is repeatedly accessed with a known meaning, replace it with a named field rather than continuing to index through anonymous padding.
For struct gaps with odd byte counts or externally fixed offsets, prefer u8 padding arrays over rounded u32 padding arrays.
Header prototypes must track matching experiments exactly; here __THPDecompressiMCURow512x448 and THPInit were updated in both thp.h and THPDec.c.
SDK init functions may require low-level cache, locked-cache, HID, and fast-cast setup to match; a simple BOOL-returning stub can hide important codegen.
decomp.dev match reports can reveal mixed outcomes: this PR gained a new __THPHuffDecodeDCTCompY match and improved THPInit, but broke __THPPrepBitStream from 100.00% to 99.96%.
Because this PR was closed without merging and had no human review text, do not assume the exact patch was accepted; use it as a set of candidate tactics to verify against later landed changes.
naming_conventions: Preserved Dolphin SDK-style internal names with double underscores, such as __THPReadHuffmanTableSpecification, __THPDecompressiMCURow512x448, and __THPHuffDecodeDCTCompY.
Used num_Vij as the explicit name for the Huffman-table value count associated with Vij.
Used a single underscore field name, _, for an unknown leading byte in THPComponent.
Kept address-derived placeholder naming for THPDec_8032FD40_Data and generic fields val0, val1, _pad, and val2 where stronger names were not evidenced.
Kept resolution-specialized function naming in __THPDecompressiMCURow512x448, __THPDecompressiMCURow640x480, and __THPDecompressiMCURowNxN.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Struct-layout tactic: replace anonymous padding access with a typed field, demonstrated by pad2[1] to num_Vij in THPHuffmanTab.
Struct-layout tactic: use exact u8 padding for THPFileInfo to maintain byte offsets that a u32 array cannot represent cleanly.
Codegen tactic: pass THPFileInfo* explicitly into __THPDecompressiMCURow512x448 and use info-> fields throughout instead of global __THPInfo.
SDK-behavior tactic: restore LC/cache/fast-cast initialization in THPInit with PPCMfhid2, DCInvalidateRange, LCEnable, and OSInitFastCast.
Constant-tuning tactic: adjust THPInit LC work buffer offsets for __THPLCWork672 from 0x2A00/0xA80 to 0x2800/0xA00.
Bot evidence: GALE01 report showed matched code 58.01% (+0.03%, +984 bytes), __THPHuffDecodeDCTCompY newly reaching 100.00%, and THPInit improving from 10.60% to 32.12%.
review_feedback: No human PR body, reviews, or review comments were captured.
decomp-dev[bot] reported 1 new match: main/dolphin/thp/THPDec __THPHuffDecodeDCTCompY, +1 byte, 99.99% to 100.00%.
decomp-dev[bot] reported 1 broken match: main/dolphin/thp/THPDec __THPPrepBitStream, -1 byte, 100.00% to 99.96%.
decomp-dev[bot] reported 6 improvements in unmatched items, including THPInit +111 bytes, 10.60% to 32.12%, and __THPReadHuffmanTableSpecification +4 bytes, 99.01% to 99.91%.
decomp-dev[bot] reported 1 regression in an unmatched item: __THPReadScaneHeader, 42.59% to 42.57%.
The PR was closed without merge roughly eight minutes after creation; no captured comment explains the closure reason.
follow_up_queries: Did a later merged PR reintroduce the THPHuffmanTab num_Vij layout or THPFileInfo byte padding from PR 2304?
Why did __THPPrepBitStream lose its 100% match after these THPDec changes?
Confirm THPInit return type, LCEnable behavior, OSInitFastCast call, and __THPLCWork672 offsets against Dolphin SDK or retail assembly.
Check whether the leading THPComponent u8 _ field is retained in later headers or replaced with a better name.
Compare later THPDec matching history for __THPDecompressiMCURow512x448 to see whether the explicit THPFileInfo* parameter was kept.
